languages.text:
"Если это не притворство, то вам есть чем гордиться, наследни{mf|к|ца}.
Вы сумел{mf||а} превозмочь жажду власти и прозреть слепоту гордыни. Однажды, когда вы научитесь всему, что я могу дать, вы станете велик{mf|им|ой} Лорд-капитаном".

"Unless you are pretending, you can be proud of yourself, my heir. You have overcome the thirst for power and you have looked beyond the veil of pride. One day, when I have taught you everything I know, you will be a great Lord Captain."
languages.original_text:
"Если это не притворство, то вам есть чем гордиться, наследни{mf|к|ца}.
Вы сумел{mf||а} превозмочь жажду власти и прозреть слепоту гордыни. Однажды, когда вы научитесь всему, что я могу дать, вы станете велик{mf|им|ой} Лорд-капитаном".

traits.locale_text:
"Unless you are pretending, you can be proud of yourself, my heir.
You have overcome your thirst for power, and your sight has pierced the veil of pride. One day, when I have taught you everything I know, you will be a great Lord Captain."

languages.text: "Egal, was Ihr sagt, Ihr könnt stolz auf Euch sein, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Ihr habt die Gier nach Macht überwunden und hinter den Schleier des Stolzes geblickt. Eines Tages, wenn ich Euch alles gelehrt habe, was ich weiß, werdet Ihr ein grandioser Lord Captain sein."
languages.original_text: "Unless you are pretending, you can be proud of yourself, my heir. You have overcome the thirst for power and you have looked beyond the veil of pride. One day, when I have taught you everything I know, you will be a great Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Egal, was Ihr sagt, Ihr könnt stolz auf Euch sein, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Ihr habt die Gier nach Macht überwunden und hinter den Schleier des Stolzes geblickt. Eines Tages, wenn ich Euch alles gelehrt habe, was ich weiß, werdet Ihr ein grandioser Lord Captain sein."

languages.text: « Si vous dites vrai, vous pouvez être {mf|fier|fière} de vous, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. Vous avez vaincu votre soif de pouvoir et levé le voile de l'orgueil. Un jour, quand je vous aurai enseigné tout ce que je sais, vous ferez {mf|un seigneur-capitaine|une seigneure-capitaine} digne de e nom. »
languages.original_text: "Unless you are pretending, you can be proud of yourself, my heir. You have overcome the thirst for power and you have looked beyond the veil of pride. One day, when I have taught you everything I know, you will be a great Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: « Si vous dites vrai, vous pouvez être {mf|fier|fière} de vous, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. Vous avez vaincu votre soif de pouvoir et levé le voile de l'orgueil. Un jour, quand je vous aurai enseigné tout ce que je sais, vous ferez {mf|un seigneur-capitaine|une seigneure-capitaine} digne de e nom. »

languages.text: «A menos que esté fingiendo, puede estar orgullos{mf|o|a}, hereder{mf|o|a}. Ha superado la sed de poder y ha sabido ver a través del velo del orgullo. Un día, cuando le haya enseñado todo lo que sé, será un{mf||a} gran Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: "Unless you are pretending, you can be proud of yourself, my heir. You have overcome the thirst for power and you have looked beyond the veil of pride. One day, when I have taught you everything I know, you will be a great Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: «A menos que esté fingiendo, puede estar orgullos{mf|o|a}, hereder{mf|o|a}. Ha superado la sed de poder y ha sabido ver a través del velo del orgullo. Un día, cuando le haya enseñado todo lo que sé, será un{mf||a} gran Lord Capitán».

languages.text: "Numara yapmıyorsan kendinle gurur duyabilirsin vârisim. Güç hırsını aştın, kibir perdesinin ötesine baktın. Gün gelip de sana bildiğim her şeyi öğrettiğimde büyük bir Lord Kaptan olacaksın."
languages.original_text: "Unless you are pretending, you can be proud of yourself, my heir. You have overcome the thirst for power and you have looked beyond the veil of pride. One day, when I have taught you everything I know, you will be a great Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Numara yapmıyorsan kendinle gurur duyabilirsin vârisim. Güç hırsını aştın, kibir perdesinin ötesine baktın. Gün gelip de sana bildiğim her şeyi öğrettiğimde büyük bir Lord Kaptan olacaksın."

languages.text: “只要你不是在装模作样，那你大可以为自己骄傲，我的继承人。你已经战胜了对权力的贪求，也看透了傲慢的表象。总有一天，当我把毕生所学传授给你时，你定能成为一位伟大的舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: "Unless you are pretending, you can be proud of yourself, my heir. You have overcome the thirst for power and you have looked beyond the veil of pride. One day, when I have taught you everything I know, you will be a great Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: “只要你不是在装模作样，那你大可以为自己骄傲，我的继承人。你已经战胜了对权力的贪求，也看透了傲慢的表象。总有一天，当我把毕生所学传授给你时，你定能成为一位伟大的舰长大人。”

languages.text: 「君が偽りのないならば、君を誇りに思う。君が権力の渇望を乗り越え、プライドのベールを透かして見た。いつか、私が知っていることをすべて君に教えた時、君は偉大な船長になるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "Unless you are pretending, you can be proud of yourself, my heir. You have overcome the thirst for power and you have looked beyond the veil of pride. One day, when I have taught you everything I know, you will be a great Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: 「君が偽りのないならば、君を誇りに思う。君が権力の渇望を乗り越え、プライドのベールを透かして見た。いつか、私が知っていることをすべて君に教えた時、君は偉大な船長になるだろう。」
